overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking through a lush summer landscape. The character traverses dense forest vegetation, walks along a turquoise river with rocky banks, crosses stone bridges, and explores a vibrant natural environment with wildflowers and tall trees.

events.description: emerging from dense vegetation to reveal the turquoise river ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through tall grass and dense bushes toward the river, sword visible on his back

entered.detail: tall green bushes and trees creating an enclosed forest environment
narrow dirt path winding through the vegetation
bright blue river water visible through the clearing trees
deciduous trees with full summer foliage forming the forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dense forest with thick vegetation surrounding the path. Geralt walks forward along a narrow dirt trail, pushing through tall grass. Around the 8-second mark, the vegetation opens up to reveal a turquoise river ahead, marking the transition from enclosed forest to the riverbank.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with clear turquoise water

events.description: fully exits dense forest onto open rocky riverbank with full sky visibility
slight turn to follow the curve of the riverbank downstream

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the rocky riverbank, observing the clear turquoise water flowing beside him

entered.detail: light-colored rocks and gravel forming the river's edge
blue-hued mountain range visible across the river valley

segments.scene_description: Having emerged from the dense forest, the scene opens onto a wide rocky riverbank bathed in bright sunlight. Geralt walks along the gravel edge beside the vividly turquoise water, with distant mountains visible across the valley. The dense vegetation falls away behind as the character follows the river's curve downstream.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with wildflowers leading to stone bridge

events.description: turns left away from the river and enters grassy meadow area
approaches and begins crossing the stone bridge over the stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns away from the river and walks through a flower-filled meadow toward a stone bridge

entered.detail: open area with tall green grass and scattered colorful wildflowers
arched stone bridge with wooden railings crossing the stream
wooden fence railings along the sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns left away from the river and enters a sunlit grassy meadow filled with wildflowers. The terrain transitions from rocky riverbank to soft dirt trail. Approaching the 35-second mark, a stone bridge with wooden railings comes into view, and the character crosses over the stream flowing below.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest path alongside the stream

events.description: exits the stone bridge and enters the forested path on the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the dirt path through the forest, moving away from the bridge

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through dense forest trees

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the scene transitions to a narrower forest path shaded by dense trees. The ground returns to dirt trail as Geralt moves away from the open meadow. The stream remains visible to the left but gradually recedes into the distance as the path continues deeper into the wooded area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge over turquoise stream with wooden railings

events.description: approaches and steps onto another stone bridge crossing the stream
stops walking and stands at the bridge railing looking down at the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches the bridge, crosses it, and stops at the center to look down at the flowing water below

entered.detail: stone bridge with wooden railings providing overlook of the stream

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Geralt approaches a stone bridge crossing back over the turquoise stream. The camera follows as he walks onto the paved bridge surface with wooden railings. Around the 65-second mark, he stops at the bridge's center, looking down at the water flowing over the rocks below, ending with a scenic overlook of the stream.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that gradually opens into a sunlit river valley and a flowering meadow. It begins with Geralt pushing through thick vegetation and tall grass along a narrow dirt trail, moving forward until the enclosed greenery gives way to a wide, rocky riverbank. As the scene expands, the camera follows the character along the gravel edge of a vividly turquoise river under bright sunlight, with distant mountains framing the valley. The terrain then shifts from the rocky shore to a soft dirt path as Geralt turns away from the water and enters a grassy meadow filled with wildflowers. Finally, the movement leads toward a stone bridge with wooden railings, which the character crosses over a flowing stream.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded forest trail that eventually opens back up to a scenic stone bridge. It begins as Geralt leaves an open meadow, moving onto a narrow dirt path where dense trees cast deep shadows over the ground. As the camera follows him deeper into the woods, the nearby stream gradually recedes into the distance and disappears from view. The scene then shifts as the forest thins, leading Geralt toward a paved stone bridge with wooden railings that crosses back over the turquoise water. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the center of the bridge, providing a scenic overlook of the stream flowing over the rocks below.
